critical_issues.title: Database Name Hardcoded
critical_issues.impact: Database connection will fail if name is changed
critical_issues.recommendation: Do NOT change database name - it must remain as yit_database

critical_issues.title: Absolute File Paths in Code
critical_issues.impact: File operations will fail if repository is moved or renamed
critical_issues.recommendation: Update all absolute paths if repository location changes. Consider using environment variables.

critical_issues.title: Google Drive Folder Name
critical_issues.impact: Backup system will create wrong folder or fail if name doesn't match
critical_issues.recommendation: Update folder name to Y-It-Backups for consistency or keep as-is if folder already exists

critical_issues.title: Systemd Service Names
critical_issues.impact: Backup scheduling will fail if service names don't match systemd configuration
critical_issues.recommendation: Service names must match systemd unit files. Keep as-is or update both code and systemd configuration together.

critical_issues.title: Log File Paths
critical_issues.impact: Logs will be written to wrong location or fail silently
critical_issues.recommendation: Log paths can be customized via environment variables. Ensure directories exist and permissions are correct.

critical_issues.title: Temporary Directory Paths
critical_issues.impact: Backup staging will fail or cleanup won't work properly
critical_issues.recommendation: Keep /tmp/yit-backups as default or update all references together via BACKUP_TEMP_DIR environment variable.

critical_issues.title: Cron Job Path References
critical_issues.impact: Scheduled backup jobs will not execute if paths are wrong
critical_issues.recommendation: Update all cron job entries if repository is moved. Use absolute paths in cron jobs.

critical_issues.title: AWS Resource Identifiers
critical_issues.impact: Backup and rate-limiting will fail if AWS resources are renamed
critical_issues.recommendation: AWS resource names are technical identifiers. Do NOT change unless resources are recreated. Document that these are not user-facing names.

warning_issues.title: Environment Variable Names
warning_issues.recommendation: Keep environment variable names as-is. These are internal identifiers. Update documentation/comments if needed.

warning_issues.title: Google Cloud Service Account Names
warning_issues.recommendation: Service account name yit-backup-service is tied to GCP project. Do not change unless recreating service account.

warning_issues.title: Package Name Inconsistency
warning_issues.recommendation: Standardize package naming - use either yit- or y-it- prefix consistently.

warning_issues.title: Relative Path Usage in Config
warning_issues.recommendation: Some configs use relative paths. Document base path assumptions clearly.

informational_issues.title: Author Metadata in PDFs
informational_issues.impact: PDF author metadata will show Y-It Guides
informational_issues.recommendation: Update if branding changes. Will not cause failures.

informational_issues.title: Documentation File Names
informational_issues.recommendation: Can be renamed safely as documentation only. Not referenced in code.

informational_issues.title: Marketing URLs in Documentation
informational_issues.recommendation: Update if domain or URL structure changes. Documentation only.

informational_issues.title: Email Addresses
informational_issues.recommendation: Update if domain changes or support structure changes.

informational_issues.title: Module Descriptions
informational_issues.recommendation: Update if branding changes. Not critical for functionality.

immediate_actions: Verify database is created as yit_database
Verify AWS S3 bucket yit-backups exists
Verify Google Drive service account yit-backup-service is configured
Test database connection with current .env variables
if_moving_repository: Update all absolute paths in code and configs
Update all cron job references to new path
Update systemd service WorkingDirectory and ExecStart paths
if_changing_branding: Update Google Drive folder name from Y-IT-Backups to Y-It-Backups
Update author metadata in PDF configs
Update marketing URLs if domain changes
Update email addresses if domain changes

conditional: All cron schedule documentation (if repo moves)
